 to put each component on its own line. The format is: 'You are a {role}.

For validate_prompt: issues = []; estimated_tokens = len(prompt) // 4; if not prompt.strip(): issues.append('Prompt is empty'); if estimated_tokens > max_tokens: issues.append(f'Prompt exceeds token limit ({estimated_tokens} > {max_tokens})'); return {'valid': len(issues) == 0, 'issues': issues, 'estimated_tokens': estimated_tokens}.
